name: orkestr-oss
description: Local-first personal agent workstation: setup, connectors, virtual browsers, WhatsApp, and timers.

scripts.check: for file in apps/*/src/*.js apps/*/bin/*.js packages/*/src/*.js apps/web/public/*.js scripts/*.mjs examples/*/executors/*.js; do if [ -e "$file" ]; then node --check "$file"; fi; done && node --test
